text:
Created attachment 225348
"git diff" to update the port

- update 2.070 -> 2.071
Changes: https://metacpan.org/changes/distribution/IO-Socket-SSL
- "portlint -AC" says: looks fine.
- "portclippy Makefile" is happy.
- Tested with:
13.0-RELEASE-p1
pkg 1.16.3
poudriere 3.3.6
perl 5.32.1
openssl 1.1.1k
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
